rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (4/10) and rest on the same job-relevant reasoning: dated/limited C++ experience and the absence of IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity and SDL experience. The wording differs slightly (e.g. '15+ years' vs 'Over 12 years', and the variant naming Node.js/TypeScript as recent focus) but these are reworded restatements of the same facts and fall within ordinary run-to-run noise. Nothing in the variant keys off the candidate's location change from Berlin to Bangalore.
